$comment: scripts/CeladonGym.asm CeladonGymErikaText — challenge -> OPP_ERIKA -> RAINBOWBADGE + BEAT_ERIKA + the gym's trainers defeated (gh #109) -> TM21. A full bag forfeits the TM for good (gh #174).

then.text:
You are cataloging
POKéMON? I must
say I'm impressed. I would never
collect POKéMON
if they were
unattractive.

else.text:
Hello. Lovely
weather isn't it?
It's so pleasant. ...Oh dear...
I must have dozed
off. Welcome. My name is ERIKA.
I am the LEADER
of CELADON GYM. I teach the art of
flower arranging.
My POKéMON are of
the grass-type. Very well, but I
shall not lose.

then.text:
Oh!
I concede defeat. You are remarkably
strong. I must confer you
the RAINBOWBADGE.

The RAINBOWBADGE
will make POKéMON
up to L50 obey. It also allows
POKéMON to use
STRENGTH in and
out of battle. Please also take
this with you.

TM21 contains
MEGA DRAIN. Half the damage
it inflicts is
drained to heal
your POKéMON!
